creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
- move *.mo files under NLS as well as missing manpages from WITHOUT_NLS
- s/wxFont::wxFont/wxFont/ for gcc45
- add @dirrmtry for stray manpage directories that are not in BSD.local.dist
  and remove redundant @dirrmtry for NLS directories

Hmm, I don't feel like sorting plist.

How-To-Repeat: WITHOUT_NLS: make install deinstall
